## Minimize The Risks of Short Circuits in Your Facility

Short circuits can have long-term effects on your power system. With Care Labs, you can rest assured of the most effective safety measures and solutions for short-circuit hazards.

Your Safety Shield, our solutions

## Implement Safety Measures To Protect From Short Circuits

From equipment damage to fire hazards, the list of potential short-circuit risks is endless. Our Short Circuit Analysis solutions are your safety tickets to mitigate these risks.

In the system by detecting potential risks and implementing the best safety measures

In the system by detecting potential risks and implementing the best safety measures

Safety Assured with our support

## Integrated Short Circuit Analysis Support in Mexico

Care Labs offers comprehensive start-to-finish support, covering all the aspects of the entire process. Industries approaching us can rest assured that with us their system becomes safe, reliable, and resilient.

The outcomes

## Data-Driven Short Circuit Analysis Reports

At Care Labs, we take extra care in providing accurate data through short circuit analysis reports. Facility owners and managers can make informed decisions and embrace the best cost-effective solutions. The report constitutes a single-line diagram of the power system, fault current calculation, protective device assessment, voltage analysis, compliance evaluation, TCC curves for selective tripping, and mitigation strategies.

The Right Technology

## Premium Short Circuit Analysis Software

With built-in compliance standards, algorithms, and graphic interface, ETAP is one of the leading software used by Care Labs for Short Circuit Analysis in the USA. The cutting-edge benefits of using ETAP are accuracy, integration with other tools, visualization, and compliance. With ETAP as our primary tool, we have converted many power system obstacles into value-adding solutions.

Being an imperative study in electrical systems and design, many key electrical devices are assessed during this study. We evaluate these devices to identify and mitigate the risks.
